title: URBZUE Hot Water Bottle with Fleece Cover, 2L Bag for Cold & Hot Therapy, Fluffy for Back Neck Pain Relief for Adult Kids
features: Safe & Durable: Our hot water bag is made from high-quality natural rubber and has passed harmful substance tests. While the UK standard for natural rubber content is 45%, URBZUE hot water bottle contain up to 55%, other lower-priced alternatives that often have less than 30%. Choose URBZUE hot water bottle for a safe and warm winter

Large Capacity & Leak-Proof: Our hot water bottle has a capacity of 2 liters that allows it to release heat for an long time. The cap with 4 threads for a tight seal, ensuring no leaks. The wide mouth allows for easy filling and emptying. Note: To be safe, it's recommended to fill the bottle NOLY 2/3 water and NO boiling water

Hot Water Bottle with Fluffy Cover: Our hot water bottle with strong thermal insulation performance brings you continuous warmth. And the hot water bottle plush cover feels velvety and soft to the touch, not only enhancing the tactile experience, but also evenly dispersing and releases the heat, effectively preventing from overheating and burns

Hot & Cold Dual Function: The hot water bottle with cover can be used to warm your bed before sleep, sooth muscle soreness, back pain, waist pain and arthritis, effectively alleviating abdominal pain during menstruation. Moreover, the hot water bottle can be used for cold compresses to reduce swelling and lower temperature

Heartwarming Gift for Winter: Our hot water bottle is foldable for storage and convenient for both home use and camping trips. It’s a perfect Christmas/Birthday gift for loved ones like wife, children, parents, husband, elders. In the cold winter, if there is a hot water bottle in your bed, it can improve the happiness index
description: Product Description URBZUE - Hot Water Bottle, Premium Natural Rubber with a Soft Fluffy Faux Fur Cover Warm and Comfortable - For a cosy night, the hot water bottle cover will retain heat to ensure your comfort. Or chilled for a cool summer day. Safe to Use - Wide mouth design with an anti-spurt lip with a secure stopper for prevent leakage. Odorless, explosion-proof seams. Best Gift - Gift for parents, children, friends, girlfriend or love one in a chilling winter; even a secret Santa Gifts. Explosion-proof Great tightness and toughness, strong load-bearing and explosion-proof, still in good condition after getting run over by the car or hand-crotch squash. But please use it properly. Heat Application With a soft fluffy cover, do not in direct contact with your skin leaded to burns. It 's best for bed warming, relief pain, back and neck stiff, menstrual cramps, stress or joint or period of pregnancy. Cold Compress Without an outside cover, it can be a cold application, or cooling bag in hot summer. Used for sprain in early stage, muscle strain, caught cold or eliminate the minor wound of swelling. Attentions: 1. Before using always check if there a no signs of damage. 2. DO NOT add boiling water into directly (Recommended to use for 45℃-80℃/113°F-176°F hot water). Better to wear the cloth cover before filling. 3. As a cold pack, recommended the water/ice cannot below -20℃. 4. When it's left unused, make it dry enough and properly air-out then place it in ventilate, avoid exposure under the sun. 5. DO NOT close it without cover to the body for a long time for fear of scald. 6. Hot water bottles must never be used as cushions or be sat on, or direct pressure being placed on. 7. Keep away from babies or children, adult supervision is required when in use.
